moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final Day!
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 reaches its dramatic climax today, July 19, with the final match between Spain and Argentina at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

angles.name: Final Whistle
angles.copy: It's all come down to this! The FIFA World Cup 2026 Final is TODAY. Spain vs Argentina, who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: Global Event
angles.copy: The world stops for one game. The World Cup Final is live today – expect unforgettable moments and football history!

moments.title: The Open Championship Final Round
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concludes today, July 19, at Royal Portrush, with golf's biggest stars battling for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Major Golf
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is up for grabs! It's the final day of The Open Championship at Royal Portrush. Who's your pick for glory?

angles.name: Tension on the Green
angles.copy: Every shot counts today as The Open Championship reaches its thrilling conclusion. Don't miss the drama on the course!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts, kicks off on Thursday, July 23, at Henham Park, Suffolk, running until July 26.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for the magic! Latitude Festival 2026 kicks off this Thursday in Suffolk. Who's heading to Henham Park?

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! This Thursday, Henham Park comes alive for four days of incredible music and arts right here in Suffolk.

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset Approaching
moments.blurb: Camp Bestival Dorset, the popular family-friendly festival, takes place from July 30 to August 2 at Lulworth Castle, promising a weekend of music, entertainment, and fun.

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Camp Bestival Dorset is just around the corner, starting July 30! Lulworth Castle transforms for four days of family festival magic. Who's ready?

angles.name: Summer Adventure
angles.copy: Packing your wellies and glitter? Camp Bestival Dorset kicks off July 30! What are you most looking forward to at the ultimate summer escape?

moments.title: Y Not Festival Countdown
moments.blurb: Y Not Festival brings rock and indie acts to the Peak District from July 30 to August 2, promising a vibrant weekend of music and camping.

angles.name: Peak District Party
angles.copy: Y Not Festival kicks off July 30! Ready for some rock and indie in the stunning Peak District? Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Rock Out Weekend
angles.copy: This summer, Y Not Festival delivers a stellar lineup of rock and indie. Get ready to headbang in the Peak District from July 30!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, Latin, and jazz, turns 79 tomorrow, July 20.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday tomorrow to the incredible Carlos Santana! What's your favourite Santana track that always gets you grooving?

angles.name: Still Inspiring
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday. His iconic guitar riffs and timeless music continue to inspire generations.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Yusuf / Cat Stevens
moments.blurb: Iconic singer-songwriter Yusuf / Cat Stevens, known for his timeless folk-rock anthems, celebrates his 78th birthday on Tuesday, July 21.

angles.name: Timeless Troubadour
angles.copy: Happy 78th birthday this Tuesday to the legendary Yusuf / Cat Stevens! Which of his beautiful songs always moves you?

angles.name: Peace Train
angles.copy: On Tuesday, Yusuf / Cat Stevens celebrates his 78th birthday. His music has a unique way of touching the soul.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder of the Eagles and a successful solo artist, celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Don Henley this Wednesday! What's your top Eagles or solo hit from this legend?

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Don Henley, the voice behind so many classics, turns 79 on Wednesday. From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', what's his best?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar hero Slash, known for his iconic top hat and blistering solos, celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 61st birthday on Thursday to the one and only Slash! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses riff that he absolutely nailed?

angles.name: Top Hat & Axe
angles.copy: Slash turns 61 this Thursday! The Guns N' Roses legend still shreds harder than anyone. What's your favourite live moment?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, celebrated for her music, films, and iconic style, turns 57 on Friday, July 24.

angles.name: J.Lo's Day
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday this Friday to the incredible Jennifer Lopez! From 'Jenny from the Block' to 'On The Floor', what's her best track?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Jennifer Lopez turns 57 on Friday! Still dominating the stage and screen, she's an icon in every sense. What's your favourite J.Lo era?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger, known for his electrifying stage presence, celebrates his 83rd birthday next Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Next Sunday, the legendary Mick Jagger turns 83! What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem that still gets you moving?

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday next Sunday to Sir Mick Jagger! The energy, the moves, the music – he's still got it. What an icon!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Geddy Lee
moments.blurb: Geddy Lee, the iconic bassist and vocalist for progressive rock legends Rush, celebrates his 73rd birthday next Wednesday, July 29.

angles.name: Rush Hour
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 73rd birthday next Wednesday to Rush's incredible Geddy Lee! What's your favourite Rush track to crank up?

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: Geddy Lee turns 73 next Wednesday! The distinctive voice and bass of Rush, a true legend of progressive rock. What an impact!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing a summer heatwave, with temperatures soaring across the country, making it perfect weather for outdoor activities.

angles.name: Heatwave Hits
angles.copy: It's officially a heatwave! How are you staying cool and making the most of the glorious sunshine today across the UK?

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Sunshine and high temperatures across the UK! Perfect excuse for a BBQ or heading to the beach. What's your plan for enjoying the weather?

moments.title: Latest UK Singles Chart News
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart has just been revealed, with new tracks making a significant impact and potential new number ones.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: The brand new UK Singles Chart is out! Who's at Number 1? Any big climbers or new entries you're loving right now?

angles.name: New Music Buzz
angles.copy: What's the hottest track in the UK right now? The latest Official Singles Chart has all the answers! Any surprises?
